heading: Student-employees
label: 8144 Student-employees
text: A student-employee as defined by who suffers disability or death as a result of personal injury arising out of and in the course of training, or incurred in the performance of duties in connection with that training, is considered for the purpose of this subchapter an employee who incurred the injury in the performance of duty.section 5351 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 1053, .Aug. 4, 1947, ch. 452, § 461 Stat. 727Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
